reviews.reviewTitle: Not worth any penny of it
reviews.reviewComments: I have one night stay in the hotel for the rate of 460k IDR. The hotel is definitely not meeting its stabdard, and hotel pic on Agoda is all photoshoped. Fixture and fitting all worn out and pretty broke, lock chain is broken, and the light on the ceiling also lost its cover, the bathroom have a stinky and gros smell!  The most disturbing thing is the level of cleaniness and tidyness, lipstick mark and finger prints can be seen on the wall, black spot and dirt are on the floor and corner. My room is facing the main street and can hear the speeding motorcycles driving through, the deadliest thing is one old man singing loudly on the street crazily for prayer or some sort of religious songs at 5.00am!!!  Hotel Grand Nanggroe is not worth any penny of it, I suggesy everyone to bypass this hotel!
